★ California Small Business Specialists

You're a
business owner,
not Account #8492.

Stop crossing your fingers every time you hit "Submit." We handle payroll details and the tax math, so you can just focus on your team.

Get Your Price Now Get Started

The Hard Truth

Is your current payroll provider a Partner or just a Call Center?

The Deadline Panic

40 minutes to nowhere. You're stuck on hold while your payroll deadline is ticking. You can't afford to be late.

The Rep Runaround

New rep, every time. You're tired of explaining your business over and over to a stranger reading a script.

The Black Hole

The "Post and Pray." You send an urgent request and hope it actually gets fixed. You deserve real answers, not a prayer.

Get Started

Simplified Payroll Starts Here

Fast, no-obligation quote — we'll reach out within one business day.

The Pink Payroll Process

High-Tech Simplicity. Human Oversight.

Three steps designed to take payroll completely off your plate — without losing the human touch.

1

The 3-Minute Entry

Log in, enter your hours, and close. Our platform is built for speed, not for "data entry." It's designed to be the easiest three minutes of your work week — so you can cross payroll off your list and move on.

2

The Expert Safety Net

You manage the entry; we manage the accuracy. If you're running tight on a deadline or have a complex question, you don't call a center — you reach out to your dedicated manager. We catch the "weird" stuff before it becomes a problem.

3

Hand-Off the Headache

From tax filings to historical data migration, we handle the high-stakes heavy lifting that keeps you up at night. Nearly 18 years of experience, and a team that treats your business like their own.

California Certified. 18+ Years of Experience.

Pink Payroll holds current California payroll certification, keeping your business compliant with every state and local requirement — year after year.

Switching Providers

Switching shouldn't be a second job.

Most business owners stay with a provider they don't like because they dread the migration. We've turned "switching" into a science. From auditing your year-to-date data to verifying your tax history, we handle the heavy lifting so your transition is seamless.

See Our Painless Switch Process

A Message from Our Founder

Why Erica Built This Company

"If you call your provider, the person who answers should actually have the answer. No transfers, no case numbers — just help."

Erica Filippo started Pink Payroll after experiencing the same payroll frustrations you face today. She wanted quick answers — but instead was stuck with 50-digit security codes, endless hold music, and "support" reps who didn't know a payroll report from a bowl of spaghetti.

Erica believed that if you call your provider, the person who answers should actually have the answer. No transfers, no "case numbers," just help.

Nearly 18 years later, that simple promise is why our very first clients are still with us.

Meet the Team →

Ready to Scale with a Partner Who Knows Your Name?

Stop settling for Big Box frustration. Let's build your compliance roadmap today.
